highlights: Deliver pre-race and post-race performance analysis to drivers and senior engineering leadership, identifying setup trends and strategic opportunities that contributed to a 95% available-point conversion ratio.
Build and maintain automated analysis tools in Python and SQL to support real-time trackside decision-making and post-event review workflows, reducing analyst turnaround time by 80%.
Designed and deployed a performance statistics pipeline and reporting interface in Python, replacing a legacy platform, saving over £100k annually and improving query speeds by 30%.
Operate within a demanding event calendar across 24 race weekends, delivering time-critical outputs aligned to engineering and coaching workflows.
Designed end-to-end data pipelines in Python to enable live sports event coverage at one-tenth of previous costs.
Built and curated a proprietary dataset for model training and benchmarking, achieving state-of-the-art detection performance.
Implemented performance monitoring infrastructure to identify system bottlenecks, then optimised processing pipelines, reducing latency by 60%.
